description: Build a generalizable 3-block skill recommendation pipeline (Phase 1: Query Generator + Skill Finder)

userStories.title: Define Query Generator interface and types
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to define the input/output interfaces for the Query Generator block.
userStories.notes: Implemented in src/skill-recommendation/types.ts and prompts.ts; npm run typecheck passes.

userStories.title: Write Mastra AI system prompt for query expansion
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to write a system prompt that generates 5 distinct query variations.
acceptanceCriteria: System prompt generates 5 distinct queries per input
userStories.notes: Implemented QUERY_GENERATOR_SYSTEM_PROMPT with five distinct strategies and query explosion constraints; covered by test/query-generator-evaluation.test.ts.

userStories.title: Implement Query Generator with Mastra AI
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to implement the Query Generator function.
acceptanceCriteria: Call Mastra AI with system prompt
userStories.notes: Implemented generateQueries() with Mastra-compatible client call, JSON coercion, fallback behavior, and passing typecheck.

userStories.title: Test Query Generator on 10 sample queries
userStories.description: As a tester, I need to verify Query Generator produces diverse query variations.
userStories.notes: Covered by test/sample-queries.json and query generator evaluation; 10/10 samples produce five unique query variants.

userStories.title: Define Skill Finder interface and types
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to define types for Skill Finder block.
userStories.notes: Implemented Skill, SkillFinderInput, and SkillFinderOutput in src/skill-recommendation/types.ts with relevanceScore.

userStories.title: Implement npx skills find wrapper
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to wrap the npx skills find CLI command.
acceptanceCriteria: Function findSkills() shells out to npx command
userStories.notes: Implemented findSkills() wrapper for npx skills find <query> --json with JSON parsing, top-five sorting, and failure fallback; covered by test/skill-finder-evaluation.test.ts.

userStories.title: Implement skill aggregation and deduplication
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to aggregate skills from multiple queries.
userStories.notes: Implemented aggregateSkills() with dedupe by id, highest-score retention, descending sort, and 30-candidate cap.

userStories.title: Test Skill Finder on Query Generator output
userStories.description: As a tester, I need to verify Skill Finder produces relevant candidates.
userStories.notes: Covered by skill finder and pipeline evaluation tests; deterministic Query Generator output aggregates to 25 candidates with scores preserved.

userStories.title: Wire up Query Generator → Skill Finder pipeline
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to connect the two blocks into end-to-end pipeline.
userStories.notes: Implemented recommendSkills() orchestration in src/skill-recommendation/pipeline.ts with inspectable intermediate outputs.

userStories.title: Add error handling and fallbacks
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to handle failures gracefully.
userStories.notes: Implemented query-generation fallback, skill-finder empty-array fallback, warnings, and error logs; covered by pipeline tests.

userStories.title: Add logging and instrumentation
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to instrument the pipeline for observability.
userStories.notes: Implemented buffered logger with DEBUG refined queries/candidates, INFO latency, ERROR context, and JSONL flush coverage.

userStories.title: Create test set with 10 diverse sample queries
userStories.description: As a tester, I need to create a test set covering different use cases.
userStories.notes: Added test/sample-queries.json with 10 diverse queries and documented expected behavior for each.

userStories.title: Run end-to-end evaluation on test set
userStories.description: As a tester, I need to evaluate the full pipeline on the test set.
userStories.notes: Covered by test/pipeline-evaluation.test.ts across all 10 sample queries: <2s latency, 25 candidates, and 80%+ relevance proxy.

userStories.title: Document learnings and Phase 2 recommendations
userStories.description: As a product manager, I need to document Phase 1 results.
userStories.notes: Documented results, learnings, blockers, and Phase 2 readiness in docs/plans/skill-recommendation/phase1-results-may13.md.
